_comment: PLACEHOLDER — deploy is M6. This is a documented stub describing the intended Railway services per spec §12.2; it is NOT wired up yet. See infra/notes.md.

db._comment: Postgres + pgvector (already provisioned on Railway). Migrations run `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;` on deploy (M2/#2).

api._comment: FastAPI backend. Builds from backend/Dockerfile, runs `uvicorn recall.main:app`, runs Alembic migrations on deploy. Reads DATABASE_URL + keys from Railway env.

web._comment: Static build of frontend/ served by a tiny static server. VITE_API_BASE_URL points at the api service URL.
